author: gb9t
content: Iter 58 result: kernel/locking/spinlock.md (generic spinlock API - spinlock.c ~427 + spinlock.h ~678 + spinlock_types.h; spin_lock/_irq/_irqsave/_bh/_trylock dispatchers + lockdep AB-BA detection + LOCKDEP_RECURSION_LIMIT + PREEMPT_RT remap to rt_mutex + lockstat) + virt/kvm/x86-mtrr.md (KVM MTRR+PAT virtualization - mtrr.c ~133; per-vCPU fixed/var MTRR shadow + MSR_IA32_MTRRCAP/_DEF_TYPE/_PHYSBASE0..7/_PHYSMASK0..7/_FIX*/PAT + per-gfn memory-type lookup + SPTE memory-type integration + SR-IOV force-UC for device MMIO + Intel SDM combine table). 66 Tier-3s total. Next iter: kernel/futex/core.md + virt/kvm/x86-smm.md (SMM emulation).
